Name: MOVIE_TEXT_PARAM
Description: Defines subtitle or on-screen text timing and content mapping for in-game movies or cutscenes.

Fields.Name: Start Time
Fields.Description: Timestamp at which the text appears during the movie.

Fields.Name: End Time
Fields.Description: Timestamp at which the text disappears during the movie.

Fields.Name: Text ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the localized text entry displayed during the movie.
